title: test/system: add test for mounting issue in the init container
body:
Test coverage for https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-14469

<!--

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening

something like `git commit -s --amend`.

comments.body:
Suggestion:
```bash
# https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-14469
@test "podman run - /run must not be world-writable in systemd containers" {
    # FIXME FIXME! Please document why --network none and --cap-add all are needed here
    run_podman run --name mycontainer -d --network none --cap-add all $SYSTEMD_IMAGE /usr/sbin/init

    # runc has always been 755; crun < 1.11 was 777
    run_podman exec mycontainer stat -c '%a' /run
    assert "$output" = "755" "stat /run"

    run_podman rm -f -t0 mycontainer
}
```
Cockpit tests failed for commit 260f814bd325864fbb6074be748837716ecfcc0a. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

Quite obviously this PR doesn't break cockpit. The rawhide run got confused somehow:
```
cp: cannot stat '/home/admin/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/metacopy-check3136313145': No such file or directory
```
This seems obscure enough to ignore here.
